title: Trident to Comically Large Fork
description: Turns tridents in to comically large forks.
body:
# **Requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)**
~~or Optifine~~

## QnA:

**Does this work only on 1.x.x?**\
This pack can work on earlier and later versoins, as long as they are compatable with resource packs.

**Is there any inspiration for this pack?**\
Yes, the "only a spoonful" vine.
